description: You can execute these commands from the CLI, as part of an automation, or in a playbook.

outputs.description: The indicator that was tested. DBotScore.Reliability The reliability value.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Indicator

outputs.description: The actual score. DBotScore.Type The indicator type.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Score

outputs.description: The vendor used to calculate the score. IP.Address IP address.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Vendor

outputs.description: ASN Value. IP.Geo.Country Source Country.
outputs.name: IP.ASN

outputs.description: Additional Geo Information - City, Region, Country Code. IP.Hostname rDNS value.
outputs.name: IP.Geo.Description

outputs.description: Description of Malicious IP. IP.Malicious.Vendor Vendor Identifying IP as Malicious.
outputs.name: IP.Malicious.Description

outputs.description: Name of identified organization scanning. GreyNoise.IP.address The IP address of the scanning device IP.
outputs.name: GreyNoise.IP.actor

outputs.description: Identifies if the IP is associated with BOT activity. GreyNoise.IP.category If a business service, identifies the category.
outputs.name: GreyNoise.IP.bot

outputs.description: Whether the device has been categorized as unknown, benign, or malicious. GreyNoise.IP.description If there is a business service, provides a description of the provider.
outputs.name: GreyNoise.IP.classification

outputs.description: If there is a business service, provides an explanation of the category. GreyNoise.IP.first_seen The date of the first observed scanning activity.
outputs.name: GreyNoise.IP.explanation

outputs.description: Whether the IP is found in GreyNoise. GreyNoise.IP.ip The IP address of the scanning device IP.
outputs.name: GreyNoise.IP.found

outputs.description: The date of the last observed scanning activity. GreyNoise.IP.last_seen_timestamp The timestamp of the last observed scanning activity.
outputs.name: GreyNoise.IP.last_seen

outputs.description: If there is a business service, indicates the last time the source record was parsed. GreyNoise.IP.metadata.asn The autonomous system identification number.
outputs.name: GreyNoise.IP.last_updated

outputs.description: The carrier information for the IP address. GreyNoise.IP.metadata.category Whether the device belongs to a business, isp, hosting, education, or mobile network.
outputs.name: GreyNoise.IP.metadata.carrier

outputs.description: The datacenter information for the IP address. GreyNoise.IP.metadata.destination_countries The list of countries targeted by scanning.
outputs.name: GreyNoise.IP.metadata.datacenter

outputs.description: The list of country codes targeted by scanning. GreyNoise.IP.metadata.domain The domain associated with the IP address.
outputs.name: GreyNoise.IP.metadata.destination_country_codes

outputs.description: The latitude coordinate of the IP address location. GreyNoise.IP.metadata.longitude The longitude coordinate of the IP address location.
outputs.name: GreyNoise.IP.metadata.latitude

outputs.description: Whether the device is on a mobile network. GreyNoise.IP.metadata.organization The organization that owns the network that the IP address belongs to.
outputs.name: GreyNoise.IP.metadata.mobile

outputs.description: The name of the operating system of the device. GreyNoise.IP.metadata.rdns Reverse DNS lookup of the IP address.
outputs.name: GreyNoise.IP.metadata.os

outputs.description: The parent domain of the reverse DNS lookup. GreyNoise.IP.metadata.rdns_validated Whether the reverse DNS lookup has been validated.
outputs.name: GreyNoise.IP.metadata.rdns_parent

outputs.description: The full name of the region the device is geographically located in. GreyNoise.IP.metadata.sensor_count The number of sensors that observed activity from this IP.
outputs.name: GreyNoise.IP.metadata.region

outputs.description: The number of sensors events recorded from this IP. GreyNoise.IP.metadata.single_destination Whether the IP targets a single destination.
outputs.name: GreyNoise.IP.metadata.sensor_hits

outputs.description: The city where the IP is geographically located. GreyNoise.IP.metadata.source_country The full name of the IP source country.
outputs.name: GreyNoise.IP.metadata.source_city

outputs.description: The country code of the IP source country. GreyNoise.IP.name If there is a business service, indicates the provider name.
outputs.name: GreyNoise.IP.metadata.source_country_code

outputs.description: The number of bytes sent by the source. GreyNoise.IP.reference If there is a business service, indicates the references used to validate the entry.
outputs.name: GreyNoise.IP.raw_data.source.bytes

outputs.description: Whether the IP is in the business services dataset. GreyNoise.IP.seen Whether the IP is in the internet scanner dataset.
outputs.name: GreyNoise.IP.riot

outputs.description: Whether the IP complete a three-way handshake during scanning. GreyNoise.IP.tags.category The category of the given tag.
outputs.name: GreyNoise.IP.spoofable

outputs.description: date The date the tag was added to the GreyNoise system. GreyNoise.IP.tags.description
outputs.name: GreyNoise.IP.tags.created

outputs.description: A description of what the tag identifies. GreyNoise.IP.tags.id The unique id of the tag.
outputs.name: string

outputs.description: The intention of the associated activity the tag identifies. GreyNoise.IP.tags.name The name of the tag.
outputs.name: GreyNoise.IP.tags.intention

outputs.description: Indicates if IPs associated with this tag should be blocked. GreyNoise.IP.tags.references A list of references used to create the tag.
outputs.name: GreyNoise.IP.tags.recommend_block

outputs.description: The unique slug of the tag. GreyNoise.IP.tags.updated_at date
outputs.name: GreyNoise.IP.tags.slug

outputs.description: GreyNoise.IP.tor Whether the IP is on the known TOR exit node list. GreyNoise.IP.trust_level
outputs.name: The date the tag was last updated.

outputs.description: If there is a business service, indicates the level of trustworthiness. GreyNoise.IP.vpn Whether the IP is associated with a knwon VPN service.
outputs.name: string

outputs.description: If the IP is part of a VPN, provides the name of the service.
outputs.name: GreyNoise.IP.vpn_service
